workItems.title: Execute & Fix E2E Tests
workItems.summary: Run pnpm test:e2e in clean environment, identify and fix flaky tests, validate all 189 tests work correctly
workItems.includes: Test execution, environment debugging, test failure remediation, regression validation
workItems.doneCriteria: All 189 tests configured and ready to execute across Chromium, Firefox, WebKit

workItems.title: CI/CD Integration
workItems.summary: Create GitHub Actions workflows for automated quality gates: pnpm lint on every commit, pnpm test on PRs, E2E tests on main branch
workItems.includes: GitHub Actions workflow creation, lint automation, test automation, Storybook build automation, status badge setup
workItems.doneCriteria: CI/CD pipeline integrated with pull requests and main branch, status badges added to README.md

workItems.title: Performance Benchmarking
workItems.summary: Establish baseline test execution times, track in CI/CD pipeline, set thresholds for regression detection
workItems.includes: Baseline measurement, CI/CD tracking integration, threshold configuration, regression detection setup
workItems.doneCriteria: Baseline metrics established, performance tracking integrated into CI/CD, regression detection enabled

workItems.title: Code Coverage Reports
workItems.summary: Generate code coverage metrics, set minimum thresholds (70%), track trends in CI/CD pipeline
workItems.includes: Coverage report generation, threshold configuration, trend tracking, gap analysis
workItems.doneCriteria: Coverage metrics established, 70% threshold configured, trend tracking enabled

workItems.title: Testing Documentation
workItems.summary: Create comprehensive testing guide (docs/TESTING.md) with debugging tips, performance baseline, and PR checklist template
workItems.includes: Test run guide, debugging troubleshooting, performance baseline documentation, PR checklist template, accessibility notes
workItems.doneCriteria: docs/TESTING.md complete, .github/pull_request_template.md created, debugging guide comprehensive

workItems.title: Performance Tracking Setup
workItems.summary: Baseline test execution times, monitor for regressions, optimize slowest tests, track in docs/PERFORMANCE_BASELINE.md
workItems.includes: Baseline measurement, regression monitoring, test optimization, historical tracking, threshold alerts
workItems.doneCriteria: docs/PERFORMANCE_BASELINE.md established with baselines and regression thresholds, E2E suite <360s total
